name: Evangel Iheuwkumere
about: Software engineer at Marchex, shipping production data visualisation for enterprise conversation analytics. I like owning a problem from first idea through to something deployed and reliable.

I am a builder. I take hard problems to production and care about software that works for real users. Outside my day job I co-founded and run a live SaaS platform, and I am building a browser-based 2D top-down survival shooter with a custom-built game engine. I also work on hardware projects.

I adapt quickly to new codebases and stacks, work well in teams with regular delivery cycles, and I am comfortable taking the lead when something needs to get shipped. I enjoy teaching programming and presenting technical ideas clearly.

products.name: Kevvlar
products.description: All-in-one project management SaaS: meetings, live chat, file sharing, and kanban boards on one project board. Access is tied to the project, so adding or removing a member updates every feature at once. ~150 users, live since 2021.

products.name: Gloomhunt
products.description: Browser-based 2D top-down survival shooter with a custom-built game engine. Players can enter paid prize challenges; the server checks every winning score before payout so results stay fair.
